name: Taco Calzone
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Chef-Mate Monterey Jack and Cheddar Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out pizza dough to fit a lightly greased 7-inch pizza pan.
2. Spread the cheese sauce evenly along the edge of the dough, leaving a 1/2 inch space from the rim.
3. Place the taco beef filling along half of the dough. Garnish with olives and green onions. Fold the dough in half and seal the edges firmly.
4. Prick the top of the calzone generously with a fork. Bake in a preheated 375°F convection oven for 8-10 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown. Serve.
Makes 1 small calzone.
